subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! Numerous letters from thee have been received, but no opportunity hath been found to reply. Therefore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق مکاتیب متعدده شما رسید ولی فرصت جواب حاصل نشد لهذا بعهده
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
